hook: You do not need more motivation as much as you need a smaller starting line.
body: Confidence routines stick when they are light enough to repeat through mood swings and real life.

hook: Men make giant social plans after one surge of determination and then disappear when the energy fades.
body: Consistency beats intensity because confidence is a conditioning process, not a pep talk.

hook: Consistency beats intensity because confidence is a conditioning process, not a pep talk.
body: A five-minute rule for starting one conversation is more durable than promising yourself you will become extroverted this month.

body: Shrink every confidence goal until you can complete it even on a mediocre day.
